name.en-US: Merits and Remission of Sin, and Infant Baptism

sources.description: Translated by Peter Holmes and Robert Ernest Wallis, and revised by Benjamin B. Warfield. From Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers, First Series, Vol. 5, Edited by Philip Schaff, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1887. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.
